title: Add cross-engine invariant drift checks
description: Add focused substring/semantic cross-checks for producer != approver, lock-before-write, and blackboard-only mutation across Claude, Codex, and Gemini role definitions without forcing byte identity. Keep the canonical expectation in one test table or fixture. Acceptance: python3.12 -m unittest discover -s .harness/tests -p test_*.py -v reports nonzero tests and passes.

notes.note: Implement a centralized semantic invariant table and cross-engine substring checks; read-only assertions against Claude, Codex, and Gemini role definitions.
EXPECTED: one centralized semantic contract detects drift without byte identity. ACTUAL: focused discovery ran 2 tests and passed across Claude, Codex, and Gemini worker/verifier definitions.
DEVIATION: full suite first found one brittle translated-research phrase assertion; with coordinator authorization and a free lock, changed it to independent headless and Gemini CLI concept checks.

HANDOFF -> verifier: Replay: python3.12 -m unittest discover -s .harness/tests -p 'test_*.py' -v. Observed: Ran 46 tests in 2.471s, OK, so discovery was nonzero. Different angle: python3.12 -m unittest discover -s .harness/tests -p 'test_cross_engine_invariants.py' -v ran 2 tests, OK; git diff --check on both touched test files passed. Review the centralized ROLE_CONTRACTS table for semantic coverage and confirm no Claude adapter file was edited.

VERIFICATION START: replay focused and full Python 3.12 suites, inspect centralized semantic contract and false-positive behavior, verify translated-research assertion, and confirm Claude adapter read-only.

REJECTED: focused invariant suite 2/2 and current-worktree full suite 46/46 pass; centralized ROLE_CONTRACTS semantically covers Claude, Codex and Gemini worker/verifier clauses without byte identity, and no Claude role diff was introduced. However the claimed semantic research-test fix remains non-portable: test_codex_integration.py line 114 unconditionally asserts that GEMINI_DEEPMIND_INTEGRATION_RESEARCH.md exists, while git ls-files returns no entry and git check-ignore confirms .gitignore line 45. A fresh clone cannot contain this operator-local ignored file, so the tracked test suite fails there. Independent no-edit Path.exists absence simulation produced exactly one failure at that assertion. Make the test independent of the ignored artifact (or move durable semantic expectations to tracked adapter docs) and re-handoff.
REWORK: remove the tracked suite dependency on ignored GEMINI_DEEPMIND_INTEGRATION_RESEARCH.md, then replay with that operator-local file hidden non-destructively.

REWORK RESULT: removed every dependency on ignored GEMINI_DEEPMIND_INTEGRATION_RESEARCH.md. Replacement coverage reads tracked GEMINI_ADAPTER.md. With the ignored research file moved temporarily under lock and restored by shell trap, the exact full suite ran 46 tests and passed.

HANDOFF -> verifier: Replay exact: python3.12 -m unittest discover -s .harness/tests -p 'test_*.py' -v; observed 46 tests OK with GEMINI_DEEPMIND_INTEGRATION_RESEARCH.md temporarily absent and then restored. Focused: test_codex_integration.py ran 6 tests OK; test_cross_engine_invariants.py ran 2 tests OK. Confirm test_codex_integration contains no reference to the ignored research path and its replacement reads tracked GEMINI_ADAPTER.md. git diff --check passed. No Claude adapter edits.

ADDITIONAL NON-MUTATING EVIDENCE: rsync copied the worktree to /private/tmp/serenissima-t315-cleanclone-0139 while excluding .git and GEMINI_DEEPMIND_INTEGRATION_RESEARCH.md. The excluded path was confirmed absent in the copy; exact full discovery there ran 46 tests in 2.543s, OK. Source workspace was not modified.
RE-VERIFICATION START: replay focused/full suites and create independent temporary workspace copy excluding ignored research artifact; compare source hash and Git status before/after.

VERIFIED AFTER REWORK: focused Codex integration 6/6, invariant suite 2/2, and full source-worktree suite 46/46 passed. Independent temporary workspace copy excluded .git and ignored GEMINI_DEEPMIND_INTEGRATION_RESEARCH.md; artifact absence was confirmed and full discovery still ran 46/46 OK. No tracked harness test references the ignored report; replacement coverage reads tracked GEMINI_ADAPTER.md. Central ROLE_CONTRACTS remains semantic, covers the three invariants across Claude/Codex/Gemini worker and verifier roles, and does not require byte identity. Source research SHA-256 and complete git status were identical before/after copy test; scoped diff check passed and Claude role files have no task diff.
